---
title: "Graph_Compiled_SNT_Neurite_Length"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_document: default
---

# Libraries

```{r Libraries}
library(tidyverse)
library(stringr)
library(DescTools)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggprism)
library(cowplot)
library(ggsignif)

Sys.setlocale(locale="C")
```

# Data import, tidying, and graphing

```{r Data import and tidying}
split_file_path <- SplitPath(file.choose())

formatted_file_path <- str_c(split_file_path$fullpath, 
                             split_file_path$fullfilename)

save_path <- str_c(split_file_path$fullpath, 
                "path_length_by_cell.svg")

tidy_data <- read.csv(formatted_file_path)

tidy_data_to_graph <- tidy_data |>
  # mutate(path_length_microns = as.numeric(Path.length...m.)) |>
  mutate(cell_id = parse_number(cell)) |>
  select(path_length_microns, date, cell_id, condition, timepoint) |>
  group_by(condition, cell_id) |>
  arrange(desc(path_length_microns), .group_by=TRUE)

plot_p <- (ggplot(data=tidy_data_to_graph, aes(x=path_length_microns))
            + geom_jitter(show.legend=F,
                            shape=1,
                            size=6,
                            aes(colour=cell_id,
                            y=condition))
            + labs(x='Cell', 
                     y='Length (microns)', 
                     title='Path length per cell')
            + scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-5, 100)))
  
print(plot_p)

plot_p +
  theme_prism(base_size = 16)
```

# Data saving
```{r Data saving}
ggsave(file=save_path, plot=plot_p)
```
